name: Klein Independent School District
districtFact: Klein ISD publishes district calendar PDFs with first day of school, grading periods, fall break, Thanksgiving Break, Winter Break, Mid-Winter Break, Spring Break, staff workdays, teacher exchange days, and high school early dismissal dates.

about.title: About Klein Independent School District
about.content: Klein Independent School District serves students in northwest Harris County in the greater Houston area. The district calendar helps families track the first day of school, grading periods, major breaks, student holidays, teacher and staff workdays, teacher exchange days, early dismissal dates, and the last day of school.

about.title: How to Use This Klein ISD Calendar
about.content: Use this page for districtwide school-year planning. Families should still confirm campus-specific testing, athletics, performances, graduation details, emergency schedule changes, and translated calendar resources through Klein ISD and their assigned school.

planningTips.title: Planning Tips for Klein ISD Families
content: Add teacher and staff workdays separately because they are student holidays even when district staff report.
Track Mid-Winter Break because it combines staff workdays, teacher exchange days, and student/staff holidays.
High school early dismissal dates affect only high school schedules in some years, so confirm campus dismissal procedures.
Use the official Klein ISD calendar page for final confirmation before booking travel around Fall Break, Winter Break, Spring Break, or long weekends.

compareIntro: Compare the Klein ISD calendar with nearby Houston-area district calendars currently available on MySchoolDates. Families often compare nearby calendars for sibling schedules, childcare coordination, transportation planning, extracurricular activities, and travel timing. Dates shown include the first day, last day, spring break, and other major school-year planning points.

districtFaqs.q: Which Klein ISD calendar does this page summarize?
districtFaqs.a: This page summarizes the Klein ISD district school calendar for the listed school years.

districtFaqs.q: Does Klein ISD publish a Spanish calendar?
districtFaqs.a: Yes. Klein ISD publishes a Spanish version for the 2026-2027 school year, linked as an alternate calendar.

districtFaqs.q: Are Klein ISD teacher and staff workdays student holidays?
districtFaqs.a: Yes. Teacher and staff workdays are listed as student no-school days on the district calendar.

districtFaqs.q: Where should families verify Klein ISD calendar updates?
districtFaqs.a: Use the official Klein ISD calendar page and school announcements for final confirmation. MySchoolDates is an independent reference and is not affiliated with Klein ISD.

relatedDistricts.name: Houston Independent School District
relatedDistricts.comparisonNote: Large nearby district useful for comparing Houston-area first day, spring break, and winter break timing.

relatedDistricts.name: Cypress-Fairbanks Independent School District
relatedDistricts.comparisonNote: Northwest Harris County district often compared with Klein ISD for school-year planning.

relatedDistricts.name: Conroe Independent School District
relatedDistricts.comparisonNote: Neighboring north Houston-area district along the Spring and The Woodlands corridor.
